reviews.review_msg: Absolutely the best prof Ive ever had. Fair marker, great feedback seeing her in office hours, loves and cares for her students, passionate, knowledgeable, and her dog is the sweetest thing ever. Was engaged the whole 4 hours of the lecture. Shes very personable, and youll love her and her classes.

One of the best profs I've ever had. It's sad that she moved to another university. We all miss her dearly. Really interesting topics and very thought-provoking assignments! Her teaching style is quite charming and she does everything she can to support her students. I recommend her class to any UC Davis student who might be reading this.

By far the best prof at Simon Fraser! Caring, understanding, fair, and actually there for you. Took her Edmund Spenser class with not much interest in the subject but she made me love it. DEF RECOMMEND! Can't wait to take another class of hers

She is an excellent orator, everything she has to say is important and useful. Do NOT skip lectures or you will find yourself sorely lacking. She provides great historical background and insight that you cannot get without attending. It isn't easy, but she is more than willing to offer help. Work hard and you will do well.

This was a very enlightening but a hard course. It requires a lot of in-depth thinking and efforts. Exam was difficult, and the research paper left me worrying all night. However, as long as the student puts in enough efforts and always seeks for extra help from the prof, it should not be a problem. Awesome prof and a great course :)
